name: mostSetMacAdr, mostGetMacAdr
title: mostSetMacAdr, mostGetMacAdr
description: The functions set and retrieve the 48 bit MAC address of the network interface controller. The MAC address identifies the network node during Ethernet-over-MOST150 communication (see OnMostEthPkt, outputMostEthPkt).

example.code:
// Set MAC address on channel MOST 1 to 01:02:03:04:05:06
mostSetMacAdr(1, 0x010203040506LL);
